compiled_state.title: Contract: figma-merge.py CLI stdout output format
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## What
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md defining the stdout JSON schema that figma-merge.py emits on success. This contract is consumed by figma-resync.py to parse change summary counts for metadata recording and user confirmation.

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md

## Unit test exemption justification
(1) No conditional logic — pure documentation artifact
(2) Any test would be a change-detector (asserts file exists and contains text)
(3) Infrastructure-boundary-only — defines a schema, no behavioral code

## Contract content
Signal name: FIGMA_MERGE_OUTPUT
Emitter: plugins/dso/scripts/figma-merge.py (stdout, on success)
Parser: plugins/dso/scripts/figma-resync.py

Fields (JSON object to stdout):
- status: "success" | "error" (string, required)
- components_added: integer — count of components new in Figma not in original manifest
- components_modified: integer — count of components updated (position, size, style, text)
- components_removed: integer — count of components removed from Figma (warning emitted if COMPLETE specs)
- behavioral_specs_preserved: integer — count of COMPLETE behavioral specs unchanged
- warnings: array of strings — non-fatal issues (e.g., removed COMPLETE spec warnings)

On error: status="error" + error_message field, all counts 0.

## AC amendment to add to 32f6-bb9e (figma-merge.py entry point task)
figma-merge.py must emit this JSON struct to stdout on both success and error (in addition to writing output artifact files).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md exists with all 6 fields defined
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md
- [ ] Contract file includes Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Fields, and Example sections
  Verify: grep -E 'Signal Name|Emitter|Parser|Fields|Example' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/figma-merge-output.md
- [ ] AC amendment comment added to task 32f6-bb9e
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show 32f6-bb9e | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert any('FIGMA_MERGE_OUTPUT' in c.get('body','') for c in d.get('comments',[]))"
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
